short_description: Development environment S3 buckets for testing
description:
Need multiple S3 buckets for development and testing environments.

Requirements:
- Bucket names: 
  - dev-testing-artifacts-sandbox
  - dev-integration-test-data
  - dev-performance-test-logs
- Environment: Development/Sandbox
- Access: Development team (dev-team-role)
- Versioning: Not required
- Encryption: Default AES-256
- Lifecycle: Delete all objects after 30 days
- Public access: Blocked
- Cross-region replication: Not needed
- Expected volume: 50GB total across all buckets
- Temporary: These buckets can be deleted after project completion
